ground_truth.title: Guided Meditations - Tara Brach
ground_truth.main_content: Guided Meditations offered freely by Tara Brach, Ph.D, psychologist, author and teacher of meditation, emotional healing and spiritual awakening. Browse the entire library, or select a category: Basic Meditations, Heart Meditations, Open Awareness Meditations, Special Meditations/Reflections. The breath can be a powerful portal to presence. This meditation guides us in relaxing with the breath, including the breath in a body scan, and then allowing the breath to serve as an anchor to the aliveness of this moment. By learning to inhabit the body, we discover the space and aliveness that fills the universe. In this meditation we are guided through the body, filling different domains with presence and awareness. The practice of visualizing and feeling a smile spreading through the body helps us access the natural tenderness and openness of our being. Behind the activity of thinking, and the ever-changing flow of sounds, sensations and feelings, there is a great and awake silence that holds all that unfolds. This space of knowing is always here, ready to be rested in. When our hearts open to the life that is here, just as it is, we discover vast loving presence.
with: Guided meditations are offered freely by Tara Brach, Ph.D, psychologist, author and teacher of meditation, emotional healing and spiritual awakening.

The breath can be a powerful portal to presence. This meditation guides us in relaxing with the breath, including the breath in a body scan, and then allowing the breath to serve as an anchor to the aliveness of this moment.
By learning to inhabit the body, we discover the space and aliveness that fills the universe. In this meditation we are guided through the body, filling different domains with presence and awareness.
When our hearts open to the life that is here, just as it is, we discover vast loving presence. This meditation engages the smile as we scan through and awaken to our body and heart.
Behind the activity of thinking, and the ever-changing flow of sounds, sensations and feelings, there is a great and awake silence that holds all that unfolds.
without: Please consider a donation of any size—your generosity allows us to offer these talks and meditations freely.

Popular Topics: Anger/Conflict, Anti-Racism, Awareness, Compassion, Fear/Trauma, Forgiveness
